text.en: GCN provided a simple and effective layer for learning from graph structure and node features together. It became a standard baseline for semi-supervised node classification and graph representation learning.
text.zh: GCN 提供了一个简单有效的层，用于同时从图结构和节点特征中学习。它成为半监督节点分类和图表示学习的标准基线。

text.en: Semi-supervised classification with graph convolutional networks
text.zh: 使用图卷积网络进行半监督分类
